name: s-agentos-kernel-v0.2.0
source: S/ AgentOS Kernel v0.1.3 WorkflowMan patch line upgraded to v0.2.0 Claude hardening line.
patches: BUG-01: objective field now validated as required in command gateway.
BUG-02: evolve_agent route corrected to evolution_engine.
BUG-03: Telemetry Supabase node event_type reference fixed.
BUG-04: Version strings updated to 0.2.0 throughout.
FEAT-01: Canonical v0.2.0 command envelope with command_id, trace_id, idempotency_key, approval_status.
FEAT-02: Supabase migration 001 adds idempotency_keys, approval_requests, audit_log tables.
FEAT-03: secret-scan.py detects key patterns before commit.
FEAT-04: validate-schemas.py cross-checks command envelope fields.
FEAT-05: workflow-lint.py checks n8n workflow safety.
FEAT-06: GitHub Actions CI runs all static QA scripts.
